Welcome to Immigration Point

We, UK immigration solicitors, aim to provide you with a quick, fast and efficient service to your query from a member of our Legal team.

Please complete the immigration enquiry form, one of our experience Lawyers will contact you within  8hrs.

If your matter is urgent and you need to speak to someone please feel free to contact us on the number above. You will get a same day response to all your enquiries.

Immigrationpoint is one of the online brands of LegalFace designed for the purpose of offering professional immigration advice by our lawyers and solicitors.

Immigrationpoint previously only dealt with exclusively to Citizen Advice Bureaus but has been open to members of the public since the 1st of August 2010 and has had a growing demand.

Your immigration enquiries will be dealt with by our senior immigration lawyers who are either regulated and or Accredited by the Solicitors Regulation Authority (SRA) or the Office of the Immigration Services Commissioner (OISC).

At Immigrationpoint we aim to provide an online immigration advisory service so to ensure that clients are connected to the right immigration adviser in a timely fashion especially for those who are unable to visit different offices due to time constraint or distance.

For answers to your immigration enquiries contact us directly with your enquiry or complete the enquiry form and you will receive responses from solicitors either via email or by telephone call back.

We deal with all complex Immigration matters and our Solicitors our equipped to handle all your enquiries because they possess over 15years combined experience in this field.

We can provide immigration services in: Romford, Havering, London and Basildon, Clacton on Sea, Chelmsford, Grays, Harlow, Loughton, Maldon, Pitsea, Southend on Sea and Wickford and several other areas.

We are one of the leading immigration solicitors and lawyers and we provide immigration advice and assistance to the public in: Bedfordshire, Berkshire, Birmingham, Buckinghamshire, Cheshire, Cornwall, Cumbria, Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Devon, Dorset, Dover, Durham, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hertfordshire, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Leicestershire, Lincoln, London, Northamptonshire, Northumberland, Nottinghamshire, Norfolk, Oxfordshire, Rutland, Surrey, Sussex, Suffolk, Somerset, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Wales, Warwickshire, Wiltshire, Worcestershire, Yorkshire- all across the United Kingdom.

Our Services

US Immigration

We assist all UK residents with US Immigration, your case will be managed by a fully qualified US Immigration Attorney  that understands UK Immigration and the expertise of US Law.

Read More

UK Immigration

If you’re planning on immigrating to the United Kingdom, you may find that the process can be complicated and overwhelming. That’s where we come in.

Read More

Immigration Point

We aim to provide you with a quick, fast and efficient service to your query from a member of our team.

With over 20 years combined immigration experience and having several of our caseworkers accredited at Level 2 , you can be safe in the knowledge that the advice you receive is fully vetted and accurate.

Our track record in providing advice of this sort can be traced to our successful relationship with over 35 Citizen Advice Bureaus (CAB) in England & Wales you are registered for our free immigration advice service.

We are one of the leading immigration solicitors and lawyers and we provide immigration advice and assistance to the public in: Bedfordshire, Berkshire, Birmingham, Buckinghamshire, Cheshire, Cornwall, Cumbria, Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Devon, Dorset, Dover, Durham, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hertfordshire, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Leicestershire, Lincoln, London, Northamptonshire, Northumberland, Nottinghamshire, Norfolk, Oxfordshire, Rutland, Surrey, Sussex, Suffolk, Somerset, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Wales, Warwickshire, Wiltshire, Worcestershire, Yorkshire- all across the United Kingdom.

We can provide immigration services in: Barnsley, Basildon, Basingstoke, Bath, Batley, Bedford, Birkenhead, Birmingham, Blackburn, Blackpool, Bolton, Bournemouth, Bradford, Bristol, Burnley, Cambridge, Carlisle, Chelmsford, Cheltenham, Chester, Chesterfield, Colchester, Coventry, Crawley, Darlington, Derby, Doncaster, Eastbourne, Exeter, Gateshead, Gillingham, Gloucester, Grimsby, Halifax, Harlow, Hartlepool, Hastings, Hemel Hempstead, High Wycombe, Huddersfield, Ipswich, Leeds, Leicester, Lincoln, Liverpool, Lowestoft, Luton, Maidstone, Manchester, Middlesbrough, Milton Keynes, Newport, Northampton, Norwich, Nottingham, Nuneaton, Oldham, Oxford, Peterborough, Plymouth, Poole, Portsmouth, Preston, Rayleigh, Reading, Redditch, Rochdale, Rotherham, Sale, Salford, Sheffield, Slough, Solihull, Southampton, Southport, Stevenage, Stockport, Sunderland, Sutton Coldfield, Swindon, Telford, Wakefield, Warrington, Watford, West Bromwich, Wigan, Woking, Wolverhampton, Worcester, Worthing Wickford and several other areas
